workspaces.title: Workspaces

errors.nameTooLong: Workspace name must be {max} characters or less
errors.nameInvalidCharacters: Workspace name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores
errors.nameUnchanged: New workspace name must be different from current name
errors.duplicateName: A workspace with this name already exists
errors.duplicateSlug: A workspace with this slug already exists
errors.confirmationMismatch: Confirmation text does not match workspace name
errors.atLeastOneWorkspace: You must have at least one workspace
errors.defaultWorkspaceDeletionForbidden: Cannot delete default workspace. Set another workspace as default first.

createDialog.title: Create New Workspace
createDialog.description: Create a workspace to isolate data or contexts for your product (teams, clients, environments).

settingsDialog.title: Workspace Settings
settingsDialog.description: Modify the workspace settings or delete the workspace.
settingsDialog.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

settingsPage.title: Workspace Settings
settingsPage.description: Update the basic workspace details and default workspace preference.

settingsForm.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

settingsPlaceholder.body: This section is visible now so workspace administration has a stable home, but management tools for it are not part of this change yet.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Workspace invitation flows will be added here in a follow-up change.

users.title: Users
users.description: Workspace user management will be added here in a follow-up change.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Workspace team management will be added here in a follow-up change.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Workspace role management will be added here in a follow-up change.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Workspace?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The workspace record will be permanently removed.
deleteDialog.defaultWorkspaceNotice: Default workspaces cannot be deleted. Set another workspace as default first.
deleteDialog.confirmationLabel: To confirm, please type “{name}” below in the box below
deleteDialog.confirmationPlaceholder: Type name of workspace to confirm deletion

emptyState.title: No Workspaces Yet
emptyState.description: Create your first workspace to get started.

create.title: Create a Workspace
create.description: Start by creating a workspace for different aspects of your life like Work, Personal, or Projects.

domain.title: Add your domain logic
domain.description: Extend src/features/ and Prisma models with the entities your app needs; keep each workspace as a boundary for that data.

switch.title: Switch Between Workspaces
switch.description: Use the workspace switcher in the sidebar to move between contexts without losing your place.

card.summary: Use this card to summarize what lives under this workspace once you add your own entities.

switcher.switchError: Unable to switch workspaces right now.

onboarding.title: Create your first workspace
onboarding.description: You do not have access to any workspaces yet. Create one to open the application, or join one from an invitation when that flow is available.
